scripts.//test: keep --passWithNoTests until T6 lands first vitest test; do not remove
scripts.//test-env: UP_SUPPRESS_T3_NOTES=1 silences the T3 USDC-domain boot warnings (gas-fallback / arc-dual-decimal) that fire on every networks.ts module load. Operators still see them outside the test runner.
scripts.//audit-vitest: vitest pinned to ^1.5 per task-1 spec; GHSA-5xrq-8626-4rwp requires vitest --ui — do NOT add --ui scripts until upgrade to >=3.2.6
scripts.//prepublishOnly: guard against accidental publish before Task 16; Task 16 removes this and runs the real release pipeline
scripts.prepublishOnly: echo 'Use Task 16 release pipeline. Do not publish directly.' && exit 1
